name: fsd-workshop
description: FSD (Feature-Sliced Design) workshop pipeline — 3 conversational skills for planning FSD architecture from requirements before any UI or code is written. requirements-analyzer (1/3: extract pages, routes, user roles from any input doc; produces fsd-blueprint.md skeleton), structure-planner (2/3: interview-driven layout zones, shared/ui candidates, widgets candidates, authentication design; refines fsd-blueprint.md), framework-adapter (3/3: maps FSD plan to specific framework folder structure — Next.js App Router, SvelteKit, Nuxt, Angular; completes fsd-blueprint.md with full directory tree). Single evolving document fsd-blueprint.md is refined by each skill.
